gui-line-beltinv: Dragoon Belt inventory (3 slots) appears here while belt is worn.
gui-summary: Any missing or zero-durability piece (belt excluded from durability check) disables its bonus and breaks set flight.
itemdesc-clothes-foot-dragoon-shoes: Dragoon set piece. While worn and with durability above 0%, grants +100% walk and sprint speed.
game:itemdesc-clothes-foot-dragoon-shoes: Dragoon set piece. While worn and with durability above 0%, grants +100% walk and sprint speed.
itemdesc-clothes-waist-dragoon-belt: Dragoon set piece. While worn, grants access to a dedicated 3-slot Dragoon Belt inventory. Belt cannot be unequipped while those slots contain items.
game:itemdesc-clothes-waist-dragoon-belt: Dragoon set piece. While worn, grants access to a dedicated 3-slot Dragoon Belt inventory. Belt cannot be unequipped while those slots contain items.
itemdesc-clothes-head-dragoon-helm: Dragoon set piece. While worn and with durability above 0%, grants +25% health regeneration.
game:itemdesc-clothes-head-dragoon-helm: Dragoon set piece. While worn and with durability above 0%, grants +25% health regeneration.
itemdesc-clothes-upperbody-dragoon-shirt: Dragoon set piece. While worn and with durability above 0%, grants +4 max HP.
game:itemdesc-clothes-upperbody-dragoon-: Dragoon set piece. While worn and with durability above 0%, grants +4 max HP.
itemdesc-blade-blackguard-dragoon: Dragoon-forged short blade. Attack Power: 9. Crafted with added powdered sulfur. While held, this sword causes continuous self-bleeding until unequipped.
game:itemdesc-blade-blackguard-dragoon: Dragoon-forged short blade. Attack Power: 9. Crafted with added powdered sulfur. While held, this sword causes continuous self-bleeding until unequipped.
